description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable Made from leatherette for absolute durability Has two roomy zippered compartment with one inner zippered compartment and Organiser sleeves to hold a mobile and essentials Two short handles and two long adjustable handles for carrying ease and style A magnetic buttoned closure to make the bag smaller according to your mood One zippered pocket on the side for additional space and a fun tassel on the zipper Brand name embossed on the side Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
